task_description: Build 6 innovative, viral-worthy AI micro-SaaS applications in viral-ai-saas/ directory. Each is a standalone Express.js app with EJS templating, SQLite database, auth, shareable output, and integration tests. Apps: AI Roast My Website, AI Excuse Generator, AI Code Roaster, AI Personality from Tweets, AI Startup Idea Generator, AI Roast My Resume.

verification.summary: All 6 apps install and pass all tests. Total: 149 tests passing across 6 apps (22+24+27+24+27+25). Tests exercise real HTTP request/response cycles covering auth flows, core generation logic, input validation, shareable links, and history. No project-level Dockerfile present.
